---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Target Package

Which package should this feature be added to?

- Package:
- Or: [ ] New package needed

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this feature to work?

```javascript
// Example API or usage
```

## Alternative Solutions

What alternatives have you considered?

## Benefits

Who would benefit from this feature? How would it improve the project?

## Implementation Complexity

(Optional) Your assessment of implementation difficulty:
- [ ] Simple (few hours)
- [ ] Moderate (1-2 days)
- [ ] Complex (multiple days)
- [ ] Unknown

## Breaking Changes

Would this introduce breaking changes?
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Maybe

If yes, describe:

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples from other projects, or screenshots.

**For AI Contributors:**
- [ ] I've checked this doesn't already exist
- [ ] I've considered backward compatibility
- [ ] I've thought about the API design
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this
